frontmatter.name: tmux-manager
frontmatter.description: Manage tmux sessions from a YAML config file. Create, kill, restart, list, or inspect sessions, send commands, tail output, and validate config. Supports session and window groups, hooks, env vars, panes, and layouts.

title: tmux-manager
description: Manage tmux sessions from a YAML config file. Create, kill, restart, list, or inspect sessions, send commands, tail output, and validate config. Supports session groups, window groups, pre/post hooks, environment variables, panes, and layouts.
